Interviewer (Time.news‚Äç Editor): Thank you for joining us today, Dr. Marco Rossi, a sports analyst and expert in Serie A. ‚ÄçToday, we witnessed a dominating ‚Äçperformance by‚Äç Inter Milan against Hellas Verona.‚Äå What were ‚Å£your initial thoughts‚Äå on ‚Äçthe match, especially ‚Äçwith‚Äå a scoreline of 5-0?
